meaning: n.阿耳特弥斯(月神与狩猎女神)
examples: But Artemis is the Goddess of the Hunt.
I was 38 when I met Artemis and 39 when we married.
Artemis was often depicted carrying a bow and arrows and the deer was sacred to her.
Artemis was operating in winds of 15 to 20 knots, with occasionally stiffer gusts.
Artemis Racing represents the Royal Swedish Yacht Club, KSSS, Sweden's largest and oldest sailing club.
